title: test(1797): add 21 tests for utils/async.ts and utils/time.ts
body:
## Summary

21 new tests for two zero-coverage utility modules.

### utils/async.ts — withTimeout utility (9 tests)

Races a promise against a timeout. Key scenarios covered:
- Promise resolves before timeout → result returned
- Timeout fires first → rejects with Error(message)
- onTimeout callback called before rejecting
- onTimeout NOT called when promise resolves first
- Timer cleared in finally block (no memory leaks)
- Promise rejects immediately → propagates error
- Promise resolves immediately → result returned
- Timeout of 0 → rejects immediately
- Generic type T passthrough

### utils/time.ts — TimeProvider + time mocking (12 tests)

Provides testable time source for the entire codebase:
- createTimeProvider with default Date.now
- createTimeProvider with custom now function
- TimeProvider interface compliance
- currentTimeMs returns real system time by default
- setCurrentTimeMs overrides the time source
- Multiple consecutive overrides
- resetCurrentTimeMs restores real clock after override
- Safe to call without prior override
- Works with fixed date values

All 31 utils tests pass.
Fixes #1797.
head: fix/1796b-utils-test-coverage
